title: moschos #3448
definition:
1) a tender juicy shoot
    1a) a sprout, of a plant or tree
 2) offspring
    2a) of men: a boy or a girl, esp. if fresh and delicate
    2b) of animals: a young one
 3) a calf, a bullock, a heifer
nasbUsage:
